case_title: JACINTH AU VS. ANDREW FINELLI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,690.00 FILED BY AU, JACINTH AS TO DEFENDANT FINELLI, ANDREW STEVENS, CRAIG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AU, JACINTH AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, CRAIG

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
